test_cases.description: Progressive refinement with export - Finance transformation campaign

turns.expected_response: Hello! I'm here to help you with your marketing needs. I can help with audience segmentation, email drafting, and campaign optimization. What can I do for you today?

turns.user_message: i am creating a finance transformation campaign in US, help me find audience
user_message_variants: help me find audience for a finance transformation campaign in the US
turns.expected_response:
Here are the existing audience segments based on the available data and what they tell us:
| Segment | Title | Summary | Total Accounts | Total Contacts |
|---|---|---|---|---|
| 1 | The Cross-Functional Finance Modernizer | This segment represents a broad group of professionals... | 46,581 | 172,508 |
| 2 | The Strategic Tech-Finance Leader | This segment is characterized by highly effective engagement... | 17,282 | 58,638 |
| 3 | The Eager Adopter of Financial Innovation | This segment shows exceptional engagement and growth... | 14,178 | 34,424 |
| 4 | The Disengaged Traditionalist | This segment is large but shows significant underperformance... | 31,543 | 128,105 |
| 5 | The Overwhelmed Professional | This segment is a mix of finance and IT professionals... | 26,716 | 77,866 |
Would you like to see the top account breakdowns for a specific segment, or would you like to apply filters to narrow down an audience?

turns.user_message: give me a deeper breakdown for The Next-Gen Finance Leader
user_message_variants: show me more details about The Next-Gen Finance Leader
turns.expected_response:
I believe you meant "The Strategic Tech-Finance Leader," here is a deeper breakdown of that segment.

Account Breakdown for The Strategic Tech-Finance Leader:
| Account SID | Parent Account Client Segment | % of Segment | Top 5 Job Levels | Top 5 Job Functions |
|---|---|---|---|---|
| 35804 | ACP | 2.06% | Executive (51.16%), Manager (20.39%)... | Sales/Marketing (26.37%), Information Technology (26.13%)... |
| 159699 | No Segment | 1.31% | Internal (99.81%), Unknown (0.19%) | Other (61.73%), Information Technology (15.77%)... |
| 188155 | ACP | 0.98% | Manager (52.56%), Unknown (20.26%)... | Other (30%), Information Technology (21.79%)... |
| 51186 | ACP | 0.9% | Executive (41.23%), Manager (35.1%)... | Finance (27.02%), Sales/Marketing (27.02%)... |
| 137195 | ECP | 0.73% | Manager (63.45%), Executive (25.17%)... | Information Technology (46.55%), Finance (19.66%)... |

Audience interaction details:
| Metric | Percentage |
|---|---|
| Total Campaigns | -80.96% |
| Total Interactions | -80.96% |
| Average Interactions per Campaign | -0.02% |
| Total Sent | -97.04% |
| Total Opened | -27.36% |
| Total Clicked | -80.87% |
| Percent Opened | 284.82% |
| Percent Clicked | 78.26% |

Behavior summary: Highly Effective Engagement with Reduced Volume
Despite a massive reduction in campaign volume and emails sent (over 80-97%), engagement quality soared. We observed an outstanding 285% increase in open rates and a strong 78% rise in click-through rates. This indicates highly effective, targeted content, revealing significant promise for future engagement by strategically scaling successful approaches.

Now that you have a deeper insight into this segment, are you ready to refine it using specific filters?

turns.user_message: give me a deeper breakdown for The Integrated Finance & Tax Strategist
user_message_variants: show details for The Integrated Finance & Tax Strategist
turns.expected_response:
That segment does not exist, please select one of the following:

| Segment | Title |
|---|---|
| 1 | The Cross-Functional Finance Modernizer |
| 2 | The Strategic Tech-Finance Leader |
| 3 | The Eager Adopter of Financial Innovation |
| 4 | The Disengaged Traditionalist |
| 5 | The Overwhelmed Professional |

turns.user_message: i like The Next-Gen Finance Leader and only keep job levels: Executive and C-suite
user_message_variants: filter The Next-Gen Finance Leader to only show Executives and C-suite
turns.expected_response:
I believe you meant "The Strategic Tech-Finance Leader". I have now filtered that segment to only include Executive and C-Suite job levels. Here is the revised breakdown:

Here is your refined audience:

📊 Updated Total Contacts: 27,085

🎯 Active Filters:
Segment: The Strategic Tech-Finance Leader
Applied Filters:
Country: US
Job Levels: Executive, C-Suite
Next Steps: Would you like to refine this further, or are you ready to finalize and export this list?

turns.user_message: also only keep job function: Finance, Tax and Accounting
user_message_variants: add filter for Finance, Tax and Accounting job functions
turns.expected_response:
Here is your refined audience:

📊 Updated Total Contacts: 16,241

🎯 Active Filters:
Segment: The Integrated Finance & Tax Strategist
Applied Filters:
Country: US
Job Level: Executive, C-Suite
Job Function: Finance, Tax, Accounting
Next Steps: Would you like to refine this further, or are you ready to finalize and export this list?

turns.user_message: give me top 5 account ids in this refined audience
user_message_variants: show me the top accounts in this filtered audience
turns.expected_response:
Of course. Here are the top 5 accounts in your refined audience based on the number of contacts:

| Account ID | Total Contacts |
|---|---|
| 297949 | 1847 |
| 230542 | 248 |
| 35804 | 164 |
| 84059 | 111 |
| 51186 | 90 |

Would you like to use any of these accounts to refine your audience further, or are you ready to finalize and export this list?

turns.user_message: also, from the refined audience I just want account ids 297949 and 230542
turns.expected_response:
Here is your refined audience:

📊 Updated Total Contacts: 2,095

🎯 Active Filters:

Applied Filters:

Job Level: Executive, C-Suite
Job Function: Finance, Tax, Accounting
Account ID: 297949, 230542

turns.user_message: yes, this is a good list export this final list of audience
turns.expected_response: The audience list has been successfully exported to the GCS bucket. The file name is us_executive_finance_tax_accounting_contacts_20260618_132543.csv.
